frame_analyses.description: Equipment list and setup overview slide shown. Lists training box, suture model, tissue holder, lap needle holder, lap Maryland forceps, lap scissors, glove and fixing device, camera (iPad), suture needles.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Instructional setup frame; not a performance task.

frame_analyses.description: Needle dancing practice demonstration on pink training pad with two needle drivers. Demonstrates hand coordination and needle control technique.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Educational demonstration of fundamental needle handling; labeled 'Needle dancing practice'.

frame_analyses.description: Continuous cis and trans suture training shown on pink pad. Two needle drivers shown performing back-and-forth suturing pattern.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Labeled 'Continuous cis and trans suture training'. Shows proper needle passage direction alternation.

frame_analyses.description: Counter-clockwise suturing pattern demonstrated on pink pad. Single needle driver shown executing curved suture paths.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Labeled 'Counter-clockwise'. Demonstrates rotational suturing pattern for wound closure.

frame_analyses.description: 360-degree rotation technique shown on pink pad with needle driver performing full rotational knot tying motion.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Labeled '360°'. Shows full rotational wrap for knot formation.

frame_analyses.description: Slip knot demonstration on pink pad. Shows knot formation and cinching technique with needle driver.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Labeled 'slip knot'. Demonstrates proper knot security and tightening.

frame_analyses.description: Complete knot formation shown with multiple suture loops on pink pad. Three distinct knot throws visible with proper configuration.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows completed knot sequence with both suture ends extended.

frame_analyses.description: Actual FLS task performance on Penrose drain model. Cream-colored drain with pre-marked suture entry/exit points. Two needle drivers visible with suture passed through drain.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Transition to actual task model (not pink pad). Demonstrates real-world application on Penrose drain.

frame_analyses.description: Knot formation phase on Penrose drain. Two needle drivers performing first throw with proper hand positioning and rotation.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows first throw (surgeon's knot) execution with clear hand exchange.

frame_analyses.description: Posterior wall closure demonstration. Labeled 'Posterior wall'. Shows final knot positioning and suture tail configuration on drain.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrates completion phase with knot secure on drain and excess suture extended.

confidence_rationale: This video is classified as INSTRUCTIONAL, not a trainee performance. It contains: (1) Equipment setup list with narration, (2) Multiple educational demonstrations on training pads labeled with technique names ('Needle dancing practice', 'Continuous cis and trans suture', 'Counter-clockwise', '360°', 'slip knot'), (3) Narrated teaching content from an expert demonstrating proper technique, (4) Transition to actual FLS model showing the techniques applied, and (5) Visual teaching on the final Penrose drain model. No performance scoring is appropriate. Teaching content extraction follows instead.
cannot_determine: Completion time — this is not a performance recording
Actual trainee performance metrics — video is educational demonstration
Individual penalty calculations — video demonstrates correct technique, not errors

demonstrated_techniques: Needle grasping and control at 2/3 point from needle tip
Needle dancing (coordinated two-hand needle control on training pad)
Continuous cis and trans suturing (alternating needle passage direction)
Counter-clockwise suturing pattern for directional closure
360-degree rotational knot wrap for secure knot formation
Slip knot technique for knot cinching and tightening
Surgeon's knot (double throw) formation with proper hand exchange
Suture placement through pre-marked entry/exit points on Penrose drain
Final knot positioning and securing on drain model
verbal_cues: Equipment list narration identifying FLS trainer box, suture model, tissue holder, lap needle holder, lap Maryland forceps, lap scissors, glove and fixing device, camera (iPad), suture needles
Labeled technique demonstrations: 'Needle dancing practice', 'Continuous cis and trans suture training', 'Counter-clockwise', '360°', 'slip knot'
Anatomical reference: 'Posterior wall' for final knot placement
common_errors_addressed: Avoiding clumsy needle handling by demonstrating smooth needle dancing coordination
Preventing inconsistent suturing by showing proper cis/trans alternation pattern
Preventing knot failure by demonstrating secure 360-degree wrap technique
Ensuring proper hand switching between throws for alternating hand control
Avoiding off-target suture placement by showing marked entry/exit points on actual drain model

video_summary: This is an FLS Task 5 instructional video showing expert-level technique demonstrations. The video progresses from fundamental needle handling on training pads (needle dancing, directional suturing, rotational patterns, knot formation) through to application on the actual FLS Penrose drain model. All techniques shown follow FLS standards and represent exemplary performance with no errors demonstrated. This is a teaching tool, not a trainee performance assessment.
